content: agent1: implementing click.edit() multi-file support (filename: str | Iterable[str] | None). Will touch src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor.edit_file -> edit_files) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function). Will try to keep changes additive/minimal to avoid clobbering.

agent1: done with my changes. Renamed Editor.edit_file(filename) -> Editor.edit_files(filenames: Iterable[str]) in _termui_impl.py (joins multiple quoted filenames into the subprocess command). termui.py's edit() now accepts filename: str | Iterable[str] | None and calls ed.edit_files(...). Editor.edit() internally now calls self.edit_files((name,)). If your process_priority work touches Editor.__init__/get_editor/edit_files, please build on top of these signatures rather than reverting the rename. My diff is in the working tree now (git diff --stat: CHANGES.rst, src/click/_termui_impl.py, src/click/termui.py) — going to write patch.txt shortly, will re-check before finalizing in case you've since edited the same files.
